---
title: "Homework 3"
subtitle: "Clustering and dimensionality reduction"
---

## Materials

- 📄 [Assignment (PDF)](hw3/assignment3_blank.pdf)
- 📝 [Template (R Markdown)](hw3/assignment3_blank.Rmd)
- 📊 [Data: `assign3_data.csv`](hw3/assign3_data.csv)

## Instructions

Open the R Markdown template, knit it once to confirm your environment is set up, and complete each problem in the appropriate section. Submit a knitted PDF (and optionally the `.Rmd` source) via Canvas before the deadline.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Reproducibility
Set a random seed at the top of your `.Rmd` so your simulation results don't change between knits. Use `set.seed(2155)` (or any fixed integer).
:::

<!--
SOLUTIONS — uncomment after the deadline to publish answer key:

## Solutions

- 📄 [Solutions (PDF)](_solutions/hw3/assignment3_answers.pdf)
- 📝 [Solutions (R Markdown)](_solutions/hw3/assignment3_answers.Rmd)
-->
